member.name: T:FeeData
member.summary: The total fees charged for a transaction. It contains three parts namely node data, network data and service data.

member.name: M:FeeData.FromProtobuf(Proto.FeeData)
member.summary: Initialize fee data object from a protobuf.

member.name: M:FeeData.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initialize fee data object from byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:FeeData.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert the fee data type into a protobuf.
